fields.indication_summary: Nicotinic receptor partial agonist indicated as an aid to smoking cessation treatment.

notes: This is a repackaged label (Carilion Materials Management is the repackager, not the original NDA holder Pfizer). It has two distinct, both-legitimate 'Revised:' dates: the Prescribing Information itself says 8/2014, while the SPL document's trailing establishment/repack block says 6/2014 -- likely because the repackager (Carilion) resubmitted SPL packaging data on a different date than the underlying label content's last revision. See revision_dates for both; do not collapse to a single value.
